calendar.matters:
Defendant Hecilo Ong'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default/Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Hecilo Ong'S Motion To Set Aside And Vacate Default/Default Judgment is Granted. Plaintiff filed Notice of Non-Opposition on August 11, 2014. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047 =302/JS

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HECILO ONG's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT. JUDGE GOLDSMITH RECUSED HIMSELF IN THIS CASE. Judge: Ernest J. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
